strengths: Broad cross-stack technical depth spanning web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure, and DevOps across 15+ years of continuous engineering work
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, showing early-mover engagement with the AI tooling space
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and open-source founder experience (GISCollective), plus community knowledge-sharing through talks and workshops
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related field, and no evidence of formal ML/AI academic background that the preferred qualifications emphasize

Current and historical titles top out at Staff/Senior level; the role targets a director-level IC scope with strategic customer advisory and org-wide influence responsibilities not evidenced in the resume
AI involvement is recent (2025-present) and implementation-scoped; no track record of building or shipping recognized AI-powered products or platforms at scale
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically versatile engineer with genuine cross-domain experience and nascent AI tooling contributions, but the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role demands a director-level individual contributor with a proven, recognized record of AI product delivery, strategic customer partnership, and organizational thought leadership — dimensions that are either absent or insufficiently evidenced in his background given that his AI work is less than two years old and his career trajectory has remained at the senior/staff execution layer.
